user.title: Hik-Connect Intercom
user.description: Log in with your Hik-Connect account — no device admin password needed. Live video streams directly from the station over your LAN; device discovery and all controls (unlock, calls, volumes, etc.) go through the Hik-Connect cloud.

data.base_url: Custom API URL (only when Server is Custom)

data_description.server: Pick your region, or Custom to enter an API URL. Global auto-routes to the right region.
data_description.base_url: e.g. apiieu.hik-connect.com — used only when Server is set to Custom.

reconfigure.title: Hik-Connect Intercom
reconfigure.description: Change the server or account for this integration. Leave the password blank to keep the current one.

data.base_url: Custom API URL (only when Server is Custom)

data_description.server: Pick your region, or Custom to enter an API URL. Global auto-routes to the right region.
data_description.base_url: e.g. apiieu.hik-connect.com — used only when Server is set to Custom.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid account or password (a CAPTCHA may be required — open the Hik-Connect app once, then retry).
error.custom_url_required: Select a server, or choose Custom and enter an API URL.

abort.account_mismatch: The account must match the one this integration was set up with. To use a different account, add a new integration.
